item.description: Detailed reports and analysis about the latest threats that Cleafy exposed are at your disposal to help you recognize and fight them.

item.title: Cleafy | Online fraud management and prevention solution
item.description: A new era for online fraud management: Cleafy combines in real-time all the most advanced fraud detection technologies in one fraud management solution.

item.title: Webinars | Cleafy
item.description: Explore past and upcoming banking fraud prevention webinars featuring key industry experts. Stay ahead of emerging threats, learn best practices, and protect your digital assets.

item.title: Security Disclosure Policy | Cleafy
item.description: A new era for online fraud management: Cleafy combines in real-time all the most advanced fraud detection technologies in one fraud management solution.

item.title: SuperCard X: exposing a Chinese-speaker MaaS for NFC Relay fraud operation
item.description: A new fraud campaign based on the Android malware "SuperCard X" and innovative NFC relay techniques is impacting Italian's banking. Read our latest report to learn more.

item.title: Get in touch: contact us | Cleafy
item.description: Your safety is our goal: get in touch with us and show us what you need, we will provide the right solution.

item.title: Press | Cleafy
item.description: All you need to know about online banking fraud and fraud management in a collection of insightful blog articles: prevention starts with education.

item.title: Online threat analysis and risk assessment | Cleafy
item.description: Cleafy is here to make technology a safer place: we are proud of our online threat analysis solution and our ability to measure risk assessment.

item.title: Online banking fraud management blog articles | Cleafy
item.description: All you need to know about online banking fraud and fraud management in a collection of insightful blog articles: prevention starts with education.

item.title: Careers in threat analysis and cybersecurity | Cleafy
item.description: Working in Cleafy means staying at the forefront against online fraud, collaborating with the best fraud hunters, using and developing advanced technologies.

item.description: Events

item.title: Cyber Threat Intelligence platform & analysis | Cleafy
item.description: Cleafy gives you access to all the information gathered by our Threat Intelligence Team: you'll be constantly updated on what’s happening in the fraud world.

item.title: Reports and white papers on cybersecurity | Cleafy
item.description: Download whitepapers and reports to explore how Cleafy, with its patented data-driven technology, helps you set precise responses.

item.title: Digital banking fraud protection and detection | Cleafy
item.description: Cleafy offers a unified fraud protection for diverse financial services, such as banks, online loan providers and digital payment services.

item.title: Fraud Extended Detection and Response (FXDR) platform | Cleafy
item.description: Cleafy is a Fraud Extended Response and Detection (FXDR) platform aimed to defeat invisible threats with specialised threat intelligence.

item.title: Partners and providers | Cleafy
item.description: Building a good company is important, but building a great network is crucial: join Cleafy and become one of our partners.

item.title: Threat intelligence insights for online banking security | Cleafy
item.description: Cleafy's Insight section analyses emerging threats and provides intelligence for proactive defense.

item.title: Whitepaper: Predicting fraud before money moves | Cleafy
item.description: Learn how modern scams combine human persuasion with technical support, and what banks can do to catch them in motion.

item.title: Online banking fraud management blog articles | Cleafy
item.description: All you need to know about online banking fraud and fraud management in a collection of insightful blog articles: prevention starts with education.

item.title: Why APP scams don’t look like fraud until it’s too late: Interview with Carmine Giangregorio
item.description: Hear from Carmine Giangregorio, Co-founder and Product Manager at Cleafy, about what fraud looks like today, how APP scams became such a serious threat, and what banks need to change now.
